raw_text:
administrator fingerprint
1.Keep at least one key out of the door for emergency.
2.When the battery is low,the indicator will blink red light. The rest power could
only be used for about 50 times.
3.When the battery is out of power,you can unlock the door with
key,or supply
the lock with power through the micro-USB port and use fingerprint or password
to unlock it.
4.Use alkaline batteries to prevent the damage by battery leakage.Batteries
must be replaced every 2 years.
